channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Roadworks - no traffic light from midfield parade, 30th April
item.description:
Tgere are roadworks controlled by traffic lights on mayplace road east, however traffic emerging from midfield parade is not traffic lifht cobtdolled which us posing a significant danger to road users and high risk of an accident
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166, Mayplace Road East, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite Byron burgers, 30th April
item.description:
10+lime bikes 15+ forest bikes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, St Giles High Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bike. I have video evidence of the 4 men that did this. I have put the other rubish that they left out side my front door in my own bin., 30th April
item.description:
1 bike

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrier Mews, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped sofa /arm chair, 30th April
item.description:
Flyrupped sofa and armchair in bushes running alongside Homebase

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs plus other stuff being dumped opposite pramsheds, Townsend House, 30th April
item.description:
Chair has been there for sometime days and people are now adding other discarded items. Sweeper (African guy) was in the block this morning (talking loudly again on his ) but he never seems to see this kind of dumping/ignores.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Strathnairn Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside. 2Alexandra. Rd NW8 0DR, 30th April
item.description:
This tree looked dead in September 2025 but now it is obviously dead and large and brittle It really needs clearing safely
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on pavement, 30th April
item.description:
Please have this car towed away or the owner to find for parking on the pavement blocking the public highway for pedestrians

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bounces Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matress on pavement, 30th April
item.description:
Matress left on pavement on Byne Road close to number 3

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Byne Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle parked outside 43 Newick Road not moved for approximately 4 weeks, 30th April
item.description:
This vehicle has been left in the same position for around four weeks without being moved. The vehicle has not shown any signs of use during this period.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newick Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Couch on the pavement, 30th April
item.description:
This couch was left in front of our building two weeks ago. We'd be grateful if it could be removed. 109 Powerscroft Road - entrance of Lawley Street. Many thanks in advance.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powerscroft Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 30th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped outside my driveway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken large bin in road, 30th April
item.description:
This has been in the road for months, one of the wheels is broken off

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bird in Bush Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: DOG FOULING ON GRASS VERGE O/S No 8, 30th April
item.description:
Resident reporting No 18 are owners of a dog and there is always dog poo on the grass verge, This morning there was dog poo o/s No 8 and it is very smelly & unhealthy & outside his car resident would like someone to look into some sort of bins or stencils on the ground and stop this happening. Residents walk along this grass verge path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmhurst, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing flytipping in front of substation, 30th April
item.description:
There is consistent fly tipping in front of the sub station by the bike shelter on my street. Someone left a mattress there the other day.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazelmere Road between glengal road and Priory Park Road, 30th April
item.description:
Debris from the trees needs sweeping as it is blowing into our homes when we open our front doors. The whole Square could do with a good clean they pick up what we point out but will not do any extra such as sweet around the trees where the debris is coming from.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside No 4 Gardnor Road, 30th April
item.description:
Water is draining from the street onto our property at 4 Gardnor Road. The water is flowing from under the road onto the area in front of the lower ground door into our property. We had Thames Water check our mains water pipe coming into the house and they said that it is not leaking. They suggested a drain under the road may be cracked and that may be the source of the water.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardnor Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass shards on the road / cycling lane, 30th April
item.description:
Bottle smashed and lots of glass in the middle of the road where the cycling lane also is. Right outside number 5 Holmdale Terrace. Would you please clean up urgently? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holmdale Terrace, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public tree overhanging our drive and wall. Constantly having to wash our vehicles, drive and wall because of bird droppings. The pavement also gets covered in the droppings. I know funds are tight in the Councils but you have a duty to maintain your trees over people's property likewise if it was our tree over the pavement. The branches unfortunately are far too high for us to prune and also too costly. Please can you look into this out at your ealiest convenience. Thank you, 30th April
item.description:
We have lived here for 5 years now and have never had the tree pruned in that time. As you can imagine it has grown emersely and some branches now come nearly half way over our drive. This causes bird droppings everywhere on our property until late Autumn. It is a health hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maple Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches on pavement, 30th April
item.description:
Tree needs trimming as branches impending pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesham Crescent, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter and food waste along the alley way, 30th April
item.description:
Lots of litter and food waste along the alley way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Cray Avenue, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
